prompt:
A lush 80 L Walstad-style planted aquarium seen at a slight angle, with a simple adhesive strip thermometer attached to the outside of the front glass. The tank shows dense aquatic plants, natural substrate, and gentle surface movement; the thermometer strip is clearly visible as a small vertical panel on the glass without any readable numbers. The overall scene communicates quick temperature checks as part of routine aquarium care.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk home-lab aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean glass highlights, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the composition clean and icon-friendly, with the thermometer strip and tank both easy to recognize.
